history.text: Zimbabwe declared independence or statehood, marking a decisive political break.
Zimbabwe became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
Zimbabwe Rhodesia appears in Zimbabwe's historical record.
Zimbabwe's independence was internationally recognized, strengthening its sovereign status.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Zimbabwe.
